ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to (e.g., Electronics, Books) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product (e.g., Smartphones, Fiction Books) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image URL of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the customer made a verified purchase */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of reports for the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., published, pending, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "moderator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the moderator (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the moderator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moderator was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the moderator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_tags" (
  "review_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review tag */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review associated with the tag */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review tag was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_tags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_reports" (
  "review_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review report */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being reported */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review report was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_reports_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_responses" (
  "review_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review response */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being responded to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the response */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review response was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_responses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_likes" (
  "review_like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review like */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being liked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the like */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review like was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_likes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_likes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
